finding_results.notes: Added two separate Carmen-internal beats before the legal-calculation turn: Earl's verdict now hits her as bodily/self-assessing pressure, and Harry's ruling now forces her to recognize that silence would implicate her before she issues the ultimatum.

summary: Re-centered the late confrontation in Carmen's close-third interior without changing chapter architecture or outcome; the scene now reaches her ultimatum through embodied perception and self-assessment instead of extended external-only coverage.
